features: Variety Pack: Our box contains 6 pairs of each of our 5 unique formulas: Hyaluronic Acid, Green Tea, Rose, 24K Gold and Retinol & Collagen Under Eye Patches. Experience the benefits of each and find your favorite! Add our under eye patches to your daily routine and trade in puffiness and dullness for a vibrant, refreshed look.

Reveal Brighter, Smoother Eyes: Depuff, reduce dark circles, and visibly smooth wrinkles, fine lines, and puffiness. Our under eye patches restore elasticity and firmness, leaving you with radiant, refreshed-looking eyes!

Powerhouse Formula: Our under eye patches contain: Hyaluronic Acid, Niacinamide, Castor Oil, Camellia Sinensis Leaf Extract (Green Tea), Hydrolyzed Collagen, Retinol, Rose Extract, and 24K Gold. This dream team works together to transform your under-eye area!
Nature’s Gentle Touch: Our under-eye patches are suitable for sensitive skin, providing a thoughtful addition to your skincare routine.

Easy to Use: Simply cleanse your face with warm water, apply the Eye Patches under your eyes, relax for 15-20 minutes, and then discard. Finish with a gentle massage around your eyes to fully absorb the benefits.
